SEARCH
Package common.dto

Class UsageReportRow

java.lang.Object
common.dto.UsageReportRow
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class UsageReportRow extends Object implements Serializable
One row in the Usage Report, showing a park/day in which the park was not fully occupied according to recorded visits.

  • Constructor Details

    • UsageReportRow

      public UsageReportRow(String date, int parkId, String parkName, int totalVisitors, int maxCapacity, int unusedCapacity)
      Creates a usage report row.
      Parameters:
      date - visit date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      parkId - park identifier
      parkName - park display name
      totalVisitors - total recorded visitors for the day
      maxCapacity - park maximum capacity
      unusedCapacity - max capacity minus recorded visitors
